_doc: Juice Shop curated expected. wildcardFamilies credit any finding of those families across all files (advisory categories the scanner correctly identifies but that aren't precisely tracked per-line in the official challenge solutions).

expected.note: sequelize.query with template literal containing req.body.email — challenges: loginAdminChallenge, loginBenderChallenge, loginJimChallenge
sequelize.query with template literal containing search criteria — challenges: unionSqlInjectionChallenge, dbSchemaChallenge
MongoDB Reviews.update({_id: req.body.id}, ..., {multi:true}) — NoSQL injection, challenge: noSqlReviewsChallenge
vm.runInContext('safeEval(orderLinesData)') — RCE via VM-sandbox escape, challenges: rceChallenge, rceOccupyChallenge
crypto.createHash('md5') used in the hash() helper that hashes passwords — challenge: weakPasswordChallenge
Math.random() used as JWT secret in denyAll() — cryptographically weak PRNG for a security-critical value
res.redirect(toUrl) where toUrl=query.to (user-controlled); allowlist check in insecurity.ts uses includes() not startsWith() — challenge: redirectChallenge
AddressModel.findOne({where:{id:req.params.id,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — UserId is user-controlled, allows accessing any user's address
AddressModel.destroy({where:{id:req.params.id,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — UserId is user-controlled, allows deleting any user's address
BasketItemModel.findOne({where:{id:req.params.id}}) — no ownership check, any authenticated user can access any basket item — challenge: basketManipulateChallenge
UserModel.findOne({where:{id:req.body.UserId,...}}) — UserId from request body, user can impersonate others to activate deluxe membership
CardModel.findOne({where:{id:req.body.paymentId,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — both IDs from request body, allows using another user's payment card
BasketModel.findOne({where:{id:req.params.id}}) then BasketItemModel.destroy — no ownership check, allows placing order for another user's basket
CardModel.findOne({where:{id:req.params.id,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — UserId from request body, allows accessing another user's payment card
CardModel.destroy({where:{id:req.params.id,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — UserId from request body, allows deleting another user's payment card
CardModel.findOne({where:{id:cardId,UserId:req.body.UserId}}) — UserId from request body, allows using another user's card for wallet top-up
$where with string concatenation of req.params.id — noSqlCommandChallenge; matchAny consumes both NoSQL Operator and $where STRUCTURAL findings
$where template literal with req.params.id — noSqlOrdersChallenge; matchAny consumes both NoSQL Operator and STRUCTURAL $where findings
Juice-Shop intentionally pins vulnerable versions of jsonwebtoken, marked, sanitize-html, etc. matchAny:true so all CVEs found in package.json count as one collective TP.
